2026-05-26JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for OntarioAppointment of Karen C. Perron, of the City of Ottawa in the Province of Ontario, associate judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario
precis: Appointment of Karen C. Perron, of the City of Ottawa in the Province of Ontario, associate judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.
